Latest News
February 27, 2026
FAA Issues Emergency Order to Immediately Revoke    the Air Carrier Certificate of StarFlite Aviation
WASHINGTON — The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) issued an emergency order immediately revoking the Air Carrier Certificate of StarFlite Aviation of Houston, Texas. The FAA alleges the Part 135 operator’s management personnel knowingly falsified pilot training records.  ...
February 25, 2026
Laser Strikes on Aircraft Drop for Second Year In a Row
February 20, 2026
FAA Proposes $2,839,900 Fine Against PEMCO World Air Services    for Aircraft Maintenance Violations
February 19, 2026
DRIVING THE NEWS: Trump’s Transportation Secretary Sean P. Duffy Debuts DCA’s Upgrade from Paper to Electronic Flight Strips
February 13, 2026
Trump’s U.S. Transportation Secretary Sean P. Duffy Doubles Down on Purging DEI From Our Skies, Calls on Airlines to Affirm Pilot Hiring is Merit-Based
